column1: # Generated 2026-05-14, updated 2026-05-15. Only third-party processors triggered by user action are listed; some are optional (configured per team).

# NOTE: 'Olares' and 'Zima' are NOT separate processors — they are operator-owned homeserver nicknames (the physical hosts running the Lastest app). They are listed in a separate Hosting Infrastructure section at the bottom for completeness, not as sub-processors.

column2: Transactional email (verification / reset / invite / build summary)
column3: Email address, name, repo name, branch, build status

column2: Repo access / PR comments / workflows / secrets / webhooks
column3: OAuth access+refresh token, repo metadata, PR metadata, commit SHA, branch, screenshot diff URLs, test summary
column7: GitHub Privacy Policy + Terms; major processor

column3: Same as GitHub for GitLab-hosted repos
OAuth tokens, Google user id, email, name, spreadsheet cell data
column7: Google API ToS + Google Workspace DPA (if enterprise)

column2: AI test generation / fix / diff analysis
column3: Full test code, user prompts, codebase snippets, screenshots (base64), console errors, network log summaries, DOM snapshots
column7: Reseller routing to Anthropic/OpenAI/etc.; review their privacy policy + retention
Anthropic Service Terms + zero-retention available for enterprise
OpenAI API Terms; default 30-day retention unless ZDR

column3: Same as above but stays on-prem

column1: Claude Agent SDK / Claude CLI subprocess
column3: Codebase, test code, build context, MCP tool calls, screenshots
column7: Same downstream provider risk as Anthropic

column3: Repo name, branch, status, counts, build URL

column7: User is responsible for endpoint security

column3: Event names, hashed user id, page URL, browser/OS
column5: Self-hosted by operator (or vendor cloud if configured)
column7: Generic usage tracking app; no PII by default. Vendor name intentionally not disclosed here.

column2: Sync user identity to CRM People record
column5: Self-hosted by operator (typically on same/adjacent infra as the app)
column7: Self-hosted CRM application configured via operator env vars. Not a third party when operator self-hosts on own infra — treat as operator-internal processing.

column2: Production app host for app.lastest.cloud — runs Next.js app pods + EB jobs
column3: All categories from the data-processing matrix at rest + in memory
column7: Server nickname, not an external service. Physical security, disk encryption, network perimeter are the operator's responsibility.
